name: Quality Houses Public Company Limited
summary: Quality Houses Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the property development business in Thailand. It operates in four segments: Real Estate Business, Hotel Business, Rental Business, and Others. The company develops and sells land and houses, and condominium units; rents residential, hotels, and office buildings; and services residential buildings. It also engages in hotel operations; lease of land; and management for rental properties, including hotels, serviced apartments, rental office buildings, and rental residential projects, as well as the manufacture and sale of ready-made concrete sheets and precast concrete. The company was incorporated in 1983 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
